name: vibe-coding-prompt-template
description: Templates and workflow for generating PRDs, Tech Designs, and MVP specifications using LLMs for AI IDEs. A documentation-only prompt template repository with no executable code.

findings_summary.notes: Personal (User) repository by KhazP with 1,848 stars. MIT license is OSI-approved and permissive. No SECURITY.md present. No executable code language detected (pure documentation/Markdown). Not archived, not a fork. Actively maintained (last updated 2026-02-25). Created April 2025. As a prompt template repository with no executable code, the attack surface is minimal. Primary risk is prompt injection via template content. Low risk overall due to documentation-only nature, but docked points for personal ownership and no SECURITY.md.
